summary: T8/T10 follow-up closed: strict release closeout no longer fails on artifact freshness debt, and release-evidence-dashboard-report now preserves dashboard artifacts in no-fail/report mode.

observations.problem: release-evidence-dashboard target writes candidate output but exits non-zero on fail state, which blocks conditional closeout chains from promoting machine-readable dashboard artifacts.
observations.why_it_matters: Operators lose deterministic downstream artifacts during conditional-pass investigations, increasing manual recovery steps and delaying stale-reference diagnostics.
observations.automation_candidate: Introduce release-evidence-dashboard-report (no-fail write target) mirroring release-closeout-summary-report semantics.
observations.suggested_followup: Completed in this task: added --no-fail CLI path, introduced release-evidence-dashboard-report target, wired refresh-fast/report flow, aligned self-check artifact to canonical envelope/schema, and stabilized tmp candidate cleanup around artifact-freshness/verify steps. Keep this observation as automated baseline coverage.

observations.surface: Makefile, pytest lanes, release evidence sealing, operator summary, external report manifest
observations.problem: Review evidence showed report-contract test evidence, semantic closeout status, and sealed artifact evidence were being read as one release signal.
observations.why_it_matters: A conditional/operator-accepted state can look like a clean machine release unless suite scope, tmp hygiene, batch digest parity, learning revalidation, and accepted-risk counts are surfaced separately.
observations.automation_candidate: Keep test-release-sealing, operator-release-summary, external-report-reference-manifest, self-check dotted path validation, and suite_scope schema fields as durable automation surfaces.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated in this task: split test lanes, added release sealing/subprocess lanes, fixed self-check watch paths, added semantic/sealed batch fields, added operator release summary and external report reference manifest, and regenerated conditional sealed evidence. Remaining clean-release follow-up is to close or renew learning readiness accepted risk before treating release-builder-full as clean authority.
